sections.subtitle: Current Form
sections.text: Real Oviedo are struggling, sitting at 19th with 0 points and no goals scored in their last 3 competitive matches. Real Sociedad, positioned 13th with 2 points, have shown resilience with draws in their recent La Liga games, scoring in both.

sections.subtitle: Head-to-Head Record
sections.text: In their last two encounters, Real Sociedad have dominated Real Oviedo, with a 2-0 win and a 0-0 draw. Sociedad have not conceded against Oviedo in these matches, indicating a defensive edge.

sections.subtitle: Season Statistics
sections.text: Oviedo's stats reflect their struggles, ranking last in goals scored and low in possession (19th) and big chances created (17th). Sociedad, while not prolific, have managed to score and concede equally (3-3), suggesting a balanced but cautious approach.

sections.subtitle: Key Factors
sections.text: Oviedo's inability to score and high defensive vulnerabilities (17th in goals conceded) contrast with Sociedad's unbeaten streak in recent head-to-heads. Sociedad’s slight attacking edge and Oviedo's poor form tilt the balance in favor of the away side.

halftimeSections.subtitle: Half-time overview
halftimeSections.text: At half-time, Real Oviedo leads Real Sociedad by a narrow margin with a scoreline of 1-0 at the Carlos Tartiere Stadium. The home side managed to capitalize on a late first-half opportunity, with Leander Dendoncker finding the net in the 40th minute with a well-taken left-footed strike. Despite Real Sociedad dominating possession and creating more entries into the final third and penalty area, they have been unable to convert their chances into goals. Oviedo, on the other hand, made the most of their limited opportunities to secure the lead heading into the break.

halftimeSections.subtitle: Team performance analysis
halftimeSections.text: Real Sociedad has shown dominance in territorial play, frequently entering the final third and pushing into the penalty area with several attempts on goal. Their higher expected goals reflect a greater volume of chances, though they’ve lacked the finishing touch. They’ve also secured a significant number of corner kicks, indicating pressure from set pieces. Real Oviedo, while less dominant in possession, has been defensively resolute and efficient in attack. Their ability to win duels and clear danger has kept them in the game, and their solitary goal showcases clinical finishing compared to their counterparts.

halftimeSections.subtitle: Key player contributions
halftimeSections.text: For Real Oviedo, Leander Dendoncker has been the standout performer, not only scoring the crucial goal but also contributing defensively with clearances and interceptions. Haissem Hassan also impressed with an assist and involvement in key plays. On the Real Sociedad side, players like Takefusa Kubo and Mikel Oyarzabal have been active in attack, registering shots on target and posing threats, though they’ve yet to break through. Ander Barrenetxea has been creative with key passes, but the team needs more sharpness in the final third to turn their efforts into results.

halftimeSections.subtitle: Attack momentum shifts
halftimeSections.text: The first half saw Real Sociedad controlling the attacking momentum for large spells, particularly in the early and middle stages, where they consistently pushed forward with sustained pressure. Real Oviedo started with some intent but soon found themselves on the back foot as the away side took charge. However, the momentum shifted in the latter part of the half, with Oviedo mounting a significant attacking spell that culminated in their goal. Towards the end of the half, Oviedo maintained a stronger attacking presence, while Sociedad struggled to regain their earlier rhythm.

halftimeSections.subtitle: Second half outlook
halftimeSections.text: Heading into the second half, Real Sociedad will likely come out with renewed intent to level the scoreline, given their dominance in creating chances and territorial control in the first half. They’ll need to improve their finishing and capitalize on set-piece opportunities to break down Oviedo’s defense. Real Oviedo, buoyed by their lead, will aim to maintain a compact defensive structure while looking for counter-attacking opportunities to extend their advantage. Expect Sociedad to push hard early on, but Oviedo’s resilience could make this a tight contest.
